title: The Rival's Gambit
description: Use all the evidence to deduce the mixing results.

hints.text: To find the result of mixing ing1 and ing4, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing1=R+ (ing1 has R+), ing4=R+ (ing4 has R+)
      → SAME sign + → R+ resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing2 and ing5, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing2=R- (ing2+ing3=R-: both share R-), ing5=R- (ing5 has R-)
      → SAME sign - → R- resolves.

To find the result of mixing ing3 and ing4, apply the mixing rule: scan colours R→G→B in order. The first colour where both ingredients share the same sign determines the result potion. If all three colours have opposing signs, the result is neutral.

Step through each colour:
  R: ing3=R- (ing2+ing3=R-: both share R-), ing4=R+ (ing4 has R+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  G: ing3=G+ (ing1+ing3=G+: both share G+), ing4=G- (ing4 has G-)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  B: ing3=B- (ing3 has B-), ing4=B+ (ing2+ing4=B+: both share B+)
      → opposite signs → skip.
  All colours opposite → neutral.
